Overrides.Override: Your Lucky or Unlucky effects are instead Unexciting Limited to 1 Runegraft of Stability
10% reduced Attributes 40% increased Global Defences Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Fortress

Input.string: /AG Nearby enemies are scorched 41% increased Effect of Scorch Inflict Lightning Exposure on Hit, applying -11% to Lightning Resistance Nearby Enemies have -9% to Lightning Resistance Culling Strike +50% to Critical Strike Multiplier
Input.name: customMods
